name: comment

source.selected_text: This PR changes the cache key. Any concerns before merge?

raw_model_output:
Here are three replies:
The cache key change looks reasonable to me, and I do not have concerns before merge.
---
I reviewed the cache key update and do not see any blockers for merge.
---
The cache key change makes sense; I am comfortable moving forward with the merge.
expected_parsed: The cache key change looks reasonable to me, and I do not have concerns before merge.
I reviewed the cache key update and do not see any blockers for merge.
The cache key change makes sense; I am comfortable moving forward with the merge.
